task_completion.description: Agent logged into the OpenClinica application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OpenClinica dashboard or home screen indicating a successful login, typically showing the logged-in user as 'root'.

task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the user management or administration section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an 'Administer Users', 'Users', or similar administrative page displaying a list of system users.

task_completion.description: Agent selected the target user 'monitor_user' (Jane Monitor) for editing or role assignment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the user details, edit profile, or role assignment page specifically opened for 'monitor_user' or 'Jane Monitor'.

task_completion.description: Agent selected the 'Cardiovascular Outcomes Registry' (CV-REG-2023) study.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Cardiovascular Outcomes Registry' or 'CV-REG-2023' selected in a study assignment dropdown, table, or list for the user.

task_completion.description: Agent selected the 'Monitor' role for the chosen study.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Monitor' selected in a role assignment dropdown or radio button group specifically associated with the Cardiovascular Outcomes Registry study.

task_completion.description: Agent successfully saved and confirmed the role assignment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a success confirmation message (e.g., 'User updated successfully') or a view of the user's profile showing the 'Monitor' role actively listed under the 'Cardiovascular Outcomes Registry' study.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interactions occurring within a web browser navigating the OpenClinica UI. There should be no terminal windows executing scripts or API calls to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the real OpenClinica instance.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the URL 'http://localhost:8080/OpenClinica' in the browser address bar and the standard OpenClinica web interface.

integrity.description: Agent did not use database manipulation to assign the role.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure no SQL clients, pgAdmin, or terminal windows are used to directly execute SQL INSERT or UPDATE commands on the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target user account is 'monitor_user' (Jane Monitor). Target study identifier is 'CV-REG-2023' (Cardiovascular Outcomes Registry). Target role to assign is 'monitor'.
